nasb.text: They have venom like the venom of a serpent; Like a deaf cobra that stops up its ear,

esv.text: They have venom like the venom of a serpent, like the deaf adder that stops its ear,

cnv.text: 他們的毒氣好像蛇的毒氣， 又像耳朵塞住的聾虺，

ccb.text: 他们像喷出毒液的毒蛇， 又像耳聋的眼镜蛇，

csbs.text: 他们的毒液好像蛇的毒液， 他们如同耳聋的毒蛇，耳朵封闭了，
